title: carduus obvallatus
intro: Carduus obvallatus, also known as the spotted thistle, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Carduus obvallatus lie in its ability to stimulate the liver and kidneys, promoting the removal of toxins from the body. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat liver and kidney diseases, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Carduus obvallatus typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and flowers to be used in teas, infusions, or capsules.
